THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT, PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF THE DEEDS OF TRUST, BANK WAS ENTITLED TO SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE AND APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER AGAINST DEFENDANT TO HAVE THE RECEIVER APPOINTED TO TAKE POSSESSION AND CHARGE OF AND TO OPERATE THE MORTGAGE PROPERTIES AS MORE SPECIFICALLY SET FORTH IN THE 1. STIPULATED ORDER APPOINTING RECEIVER EXPARTE; AND 2. PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IN AID OF RECEIVER FILED BY THIS COURT ON APRIL 20, 2011 IN THE ABOVE-ENTITLED ACTION. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT THE RECEIVER PREVIOUSLY APPOINTED IN THE ABOVE-ENTITLED ACTION WAS DISCHARGED PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF THAT CERTAIN INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT BY COURT AFTER DEFAULT ENTERED ON MARCH 23, 2012 IN THE ABOVE-ENTITLED ACTION.
